description_long: This apartment building features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof adorned by a striking geometric pattern. The exterior is clad in dark wood paneling, contrasted by large, blue-tinted glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. The front facade includes a covered entryway and a spacious balcony running along the upper floor, supported by slender columns. The side elevations display a mix of window sizes, some grouped and others staggered, contributing to a dynamic yet orderly appearance. The rear of the building is simpler, with tall vertical windows and a smaller covered area. The overall structure is robust and contemporary, suitable for urban residential environments.
description: A modern, two-story apartment building with dark wood cladding, large blue-tinted windows, and a geometric patterned flat roof. Features include a prominent balcony and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, and a full-length balcony on the upper floor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a mix of window sizes and the extension of the balcony, with wood paneling dominating the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with tall vertical windows, a smaller covered area, and the geometric roof pattern clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with staggered windows and a clear view of the building's depth and wood paneling.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front, with grouped and staggered placements on the sides, providing both uniformity and visual interest.
